name: ragkit
description: Standalone knowledge-base RAG: chunk + embed + multi-channel recall (vector/lexical/metadata, RRF-fused) over distill-style knowledge-base/ directories.
skillInstructions:
Kimi Code tool mapping for ragkit skills:
- When a skill refers to the `Skill` tool (invoke a skill by name, e.g. ragkit:query / ragkit:embed), use Kimi Code's native `Skill` tool.
- When a skill says to ask the user or present options, call Kimi Code's `AskUserQuestion` tool.
- Use Kimi Code's `Read`, `Bash`, `Grep`, `Glob` and MCP tools by their exposed names. Do NOT hand-roll retrieval: only call ragkit's own scripts; never read the `.ragkit` vector files or compute similarity yourself.
